title: Smoky Chicken Kebabs
description: A delicious and flavorful kebab recipe with a smoky twist. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner.

ingredients.name: Smoky olive oil
ingredients.notes: or regular olive oil with a pinch of smoked paprika

ingredients.name: Mediterranean seasoning
ingredients.notes: or a mix of oregano, thyme, and rosemary

instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together smoky olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, and Mediterranean seasoning.
3. Add the chicken cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
4. Thread the marinated chicken onto the wooden skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the chicken is cooked through and slightly charred.
7. Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley and lemon wedges if desired.
